title_en: 5. Would you like to meet him outside the institution? (cont.)
content_en: Al-тАШAbbas said to himself, тАЬWhat is wrong with him? May Allah curse him! Is he rushing out because he is afraid that I will insult him?тАЭ However, Abu Jahl had heard the voice of Dhamdham bin тАШAmr al-Ghifari, who was sent by Abu Sufyan to seek the aid of the people of Makkah. Dhamdham was shouting from the valley, mounted on his camel. He had inямВicted injury on the camelтАЩs nose such that it was bleeding. He had torn up his shirt and was shouting, тАЬO Quraysh! The merchandise! The merchandise! Your merchandise is with Abu Sufyan, which is going to be intercepted by Muhammad and his companions! I donтАЩt see you coming to Keeping a secret their aid in time!тАЭ He then shouted at the top of his voice, тАЬHelp! Help!тАЭ The Quraysh then prepared for the battle and marched forth, and the defeat and the humiliation they endured in the end is something well known. Consider how a secret was spread in the blinking of an eye, despite of all the efforts to keep it a secret! Another story about disclosing the secrets is when тАШUmar тАУ may Allah be pleased with him тАУ accepted Islam and wanted to spread the news far and wide. He approached a man who was well known for spreading news. He said, тАЬO so-and-so, I am going to tell you a secret, so please keep my secret!тАЭ He said, тАЬWhat is your secret?тАЭ тАШUmar replied, тАЬI have accepted Islam, so be careful that you do not inform anyone!тАЭ As soon as тАШUmar left him, the man began to go from people to people saying, тАЬDid you know that тАШUmar has embraced Islam? Did you know that тАШUmar has embraced Islam?тАЭ How bizarre! He was like a mobile news agency! One day, the Prophet яБе sent Anas to do something for him, and on his way he passed by his mother. His mother asked him, тАЬWhat did the Prophet яБе despatch you for?тАЭ He said, тАЬBy Allah, I will never reveal the secret of the Messenger of Allah яБе.тАЭ Therefore, the Prophet яБе would teach his Companions to keep secrets so that they be responsible people. This is how seri60 Keeping a secret ous Anas was in keeping secrets, even when he was very young. Perhaps you may not ямБnd anyone like Anas today! тАШAтАЩishah тАУ may Allah be pleased with her тАУ said, тАЬFatimah once came to us walking as the Prophet яБе would walk. The Prophet яБе said to her, тАШWelcome, my dear daughter!тАЩ He then sat her down, either to his right or left and told her a secret which made her cry. He said to her, тАШWhy are you crying?тАЩ He then told her another secret and she laughed. I thought to myself, тАШI have never seen joyous feelings mixed with sadness in a person like this!тАЩ тАШI asked Fatimah about what the Prophet яБе had told herтАЩ. She said: тАШI will not reveal the secrets of the Messenger of Allah яБе.тАЩ When the Prophet яБе passed away, I asked her about it and she said: тАШHe told me in conямБdence that Jibril revises the QurтАЩan with him once a year, but this year he revised it twice. I see it as an indication of my death. You will be the ямБrst of my household to join me.тАЩ тАШWhen I heard this I cried. He then said to me: тАШWouldnтАЩt you like to be the leader of the women of Paradise or the leader of the believing women?тАЩ When I heard this I laughed.тАЩтАЭ You are valued by your ability to keep secrets, for then the people will trust you and open up their hearts to you. Your status will increase in their eyes and they will look at you as a trustworthy person. Hence, train yourself to keep your own secrets and that of others. Keeping a secret It is said The one who knows your secrets enslaves you. Keeping a secret 409 (61) FulямБlling peopleтАЩs needs When I began my Masters degree thesis, I read a great number of heresiographical works. One of the philosophical schools I read about was known as pragmatism. When I studied this thought deeply, I realised why we hear that in Europe and America the son abandons his father, and if he sees him in a restaurant, each of them pay for their own meal. Their philosophy says, тАЬIf you are not serving my interests, why should I serve you? Why should I spend my money on you? Why should I spend my time on you and struggle without any material gain?тАЭ Islam turned this idea upside down.
